## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] New code has unit tests (adapters require `parser.test.ts`)
- [ ] Migrations are append-only (no edits to existing migration files)
- [ ] No user message content logged at info level
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a new provider adapter was added
